sources: GitHub API via gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}
policy: External plugins may read/search/analyze/propose/render only; live mutation remains behind obslayer apply approval manifest.

components.name: Dataview
components.description: Run advanced queries over your vault.
components.risk_note: Low: read/query only when used for dashboards; DataviewJS must be treated as local code and reviewed.

components.name: Templater
components.description: Create and use dynamic templates.
components.risk_note: Medium: can execute scripts and create notes; use only for human/manual templates or sandboxed generated proposals.

components.name: Tasks
components.description: Track tasks across your vault. Supports due dates, recurring tasks, done dates, sub-set of checklist items, and filtering. Maintained by Clare Macrae and Ilyas Landikov, created by Martin Schenck.
components.ool_role: task query layer for review dashboard
components.risk_note: Low-medium: writes task status when used interactively; automation should read/query only.

components.name: Omnisearch
components.description: Intelligent search for your notes, PDFs, and OCR for images.
components.ool_role: local search UI and evidence lookup
components.risk_note: Low-medium: OCR/PDF indexing increases local index surface; keep local-only and exclude secrets/protected paths.

components.name: Virtual Content
components.description: Display markdown text (including dataview queries or Bases) at the bottom, top or in the sidebar for all notes which match a specified rule, without modifying them.
components.risk_note: Low: explicitly displays virtual content without modifying notes; good fit for review hints.

components.name: Excalidraw
components.description: Visual PKM powerhouse. Create and edit Excalidraw drawings.
components.risk_note: Medium: AGPL and large plugin surface; use for manual visual layer, generated sources stay in repo/out first.

components.name: Metadata Menu
components.description: For data quality enthusiasts and Dataview users: access and manage the metadata of your notes.
components.risk_note: Medium: edits frontmatter; allow manual review workflows only, no autonomous bulk mutation.

components.name: Tag Wrangler
components.description: Rename, merge, toggle, and search tags from the tag pane.
components.risk_note: High for automation: rename/merge mutates vault-wide tags; manual-only after proposal approval.

components.name: Linter
components.description: Format and style your notes. Linter can be used to format YAML tags, aliases, arrays, and metadata; footnotes; headings; spacing; math blocks; regular Markdown contents like list, italics, and bold styles; and more with the use of custom rule options.
components.risk_note: High for automation: formatter mutates notes; only against sandbox/copy or through obslayer proposals.

components.name: Find orphaned files and broken links
components.description: Find files that are not linked anywhere and would otherwise be lost in your vault. In other words: files with no backlinks.
components.risk_note: Low-medium: evidence plugin; do not delete/move, export findings to proposal/report.

components.name: Dangling links
components.description: Add a sidebar showing any dangling links in a vault. Dangling links are orphaned links that don't point to anything in the vault.
components.risk_note: Low-medium: older/smaller plugin; use as corroborating UI signal, not sole source of truth.

components.name: Metadata Extractor
components.description: Metadata export (on a schedule) for integration with third-party apps like launchers or graph analysis software.
components.risk_note: Medium: scheduled exporter can leak metadata; outputs must go under out/ and exclude protected paths.

components.name: Dataview Serializer
components.description: Serialize Dataview queries to Markdown, and keep the Markdown representation up to date
components.risk_note: Medium-high: writes serialized notes; useful only in sandbox/proposal path.

components.name: Smart Connections
components.description: Find related notes and excerpts while writing. Your AI link building copilot displays relevant content in graph + list view. A local embedding model powers semantic search. Zero setup. No API key.
components.risk_note: Medium-high: excellent fit for local semantic search, but license reported NOASSERTION and AI/index privacy need separate sandbox review.

components.name: Local GPT
components.description: Local Ollama and OpenAI-like GPT's assistance for maximum privacy and offline access.
components.risk_note: Medium: privacy-friendly local option; ensure no direct edits or external endpoints by default.

components.name: Copilot
components.description: Your AI Copilot: Chat with Your Second Brain, Learn Faster, Work Smarter.
components.risk_note: High: AGPL, external model/API and agentic actions; not a default OOL component before policy sandbox.

components.name: Dataview Publisher
components.description: Output markdown from your Dataview queries and keep them up to date. You can also publish them.
components.risk_note: High: publishing/write semantics and lower adoption; avoid until explicit publication scope.

components.name: File Cooker
components.description: Deal batch notes from search results,current file, or Dataview query string.
components.risk_note: High: batch mutation tool; not a ready chunk for autonomous OOL unless wrapped behind proposal gate.

components.name: Auto Note Mover
components.description: Automatically move the active notes to their respective folders according to rules you set.
components.risk_note: High/stale: automatic moves are live mutation; only consider after sandbox plus explicit approval.

components.name: Link Converter
components.description: Scan all your links in the vault and convert them to your desired format.
components.risk_note: High: scans and converts links vault-wide; proposal-only, no direct plugin automation.

components.name: Vault Operator
components.description: Real AI agent for your vault. Coworker, Copilot & thinking partner, that maintains your memory & knowledge, adapts to your workflows, uses plugins, skills & tools with full safety controls. BYOK & MCP - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
components.risk_note: High: real AI agent with tools; explicitly unreviewed in registry description, conflicts with obslayer as sole mutation gate.

components.name: Superpower Inside
components.description: Desktop AI copilot for Obsidian with LLM chat, RAG, MCP tools, and source-aware context - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
components.risk_note: High: unreviewed AI copilot with MCP/tools; defer until separate threat model.
